body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->

Closes #2374 

Components
- [x] implement slab ocean
- [x] fix `ρ_cloud_liq -> ρ_cloud_ice` bug for snow precipitation conversions
- [x] accumulate precipitation in slab ocean at every stage as `u.sfc.P_minus_E`
- [x] add conservation checks (target: sqrt(eps))
  - [x] energy
  - [x] water 
- [x] `horizontal_integral_at_boundary` extended and moved to utilities (used in `callbacks.jl` and the `driver.jl`) and the missing info on the vertical discretization of the parent 3d field is highlighted in [this issue](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/issues/1578)
- [x] column-integrated precipitation is now defined on faces (following evaporation and other surface properties. 

## Notes
- `NCDatasets` precompilation failures: restricted to v0.13.1 (issue: #2460)
- 300% increase in walltime before and after rebase on local coarse runs. (not captured in `build_history` of the last merge, since doesn't track any of the AMIP/aquaplanet experiments - only baroclinic wave and held suarez) (issue: #2459)
- conservation of long runs: (issue: #2458)
  - bubble correction leads to worse water conservation
  - both energy and water conservation errors grow in time. For now we increase the atol to be `sqrt(eps(FT)) * 50` for the 100d long run and the conservation issues will be dealt with separately. 
- [coarse](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/commit/72e17de2eff3e4b98deb0a812e0326ce49a7733d) run completes 100d ([build](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-longruns/builds/1309#018cae79-de7e-4c27-9fbe-037cb4667400)), fine (target) resolution does not complete 3 timesteps ([build](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-longruns/builds/1308#018cae58-ede2-4e25-9c38-0eea370e061c)). The precise setup for the target resolution will be identified as part of another PR (issue: #2457). 

## Log of errors of tested configs (10-day coarse)

### ENERGY
#### dry:
- vert_diff = false, no rad -> Δe_sfc: 0, Δe_atmos: 5.0440316f17 (abs: 2.766592f23)
- vert_diff = true, no rad -> Δe = -1.3581168f18
- vert_diff = true, clearsky -> Δe = -3.634405f18
- vert_diff = true gray -> Δe = 2.4396f19

#### moist, 0M:
- vert_diff = false, clersky -> Δe = 3.634405f18
- vert_diff = true, clearsky -> Δe = -6.654969f19

### WATER
#### moist, 0M:
- vert_diff = false, clearsky -> Δw_atmos = 0 - no init q
- vert_diff = true, clearsky, callback precip accumulation -> Δw_tot =  0.00096921396f0 > sqrt(eps(FT))
- vert_diff = true, clearsky, precip accumulation in Y.sfc at every stage  -> error_tot =  0.00023729318f0 < sqrt(eps(FT))
- vert_diff = true, clearsky, precip accumulation in Y.sfc at every stage, bubble correction  -> error_tot = 0.0007678267f0 > sqrt(eps(FT))




<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Add a slab ocean and energy and water conservation tests in long runs
